title: 10 best herbal teas for menopause
description: Turmeric teas helps with menopause because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Menopause can bring on a range of uncomfortable symptoms, including hot flashes, night sweats, and joint pain. The curcumin in turmeric tea has been shown to alleviate these symptoms by reducing inflammation and improving hormone balance. Additionally, turmeric's adaptogenic properties help the body adapt to stress, which is particularly important during menopause when hormonal fluctu...
